nodes.name: Rufous-tailed tailorbird
nodes.summary: Rufous-tailed tailorbird（Orthotomus sericeus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Rufous-tailed tailorbird。

nodes.name: Orthotomus
nodes.summary: Orthotomus（Orthotomus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联13种鸟类，如Rufous-fronted tailorbird、黑喉缝叶莺、柬埔寨缝叶莺等13种鸟类。

nodes.name: Rufous-tailed tailorbird
nodes.summary: The rufous-tailed tailorbird (Orthotomus sericeus) is a species of bird formerly placed in the "Old World warbler" assemblage, it but now placed in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Brunei, Indonesia, Malaysia, Myanmar, the Philippines, Singapore, and Thailand. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical mangrove forest. References
